response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-relevant tools, plus strong architecture and DevOps exposure, but his title and experience level (Staff/Senior) far exceed the junior/mid-level role, and his German language barrier and high on-site requirement may pose integration risks despite his Berlin-based roles.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven full-stack ownership from database to UI with clean architecture focus
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills including Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role with Staff/Senior titles since 2016
German language proficiency is only basic, conflicting with high on-site requirement in Berlin
Extensive experience may lead to misalignment with team structure or career progression expectations
